queries.question: Provide beach clubs and water sport rentals where their beach's phone number is 555-555-5555.
queries.sql:
SELECT Beach_Clubs.name
FROM Beach_Clubs JOIN Beaches ON Beach_Clubs.Beach_id = Beaches.id
WHERE Beaches.phonenumber = "555-555-5555"
UNION
SELECT Watersports_Rentals.name
FROM Watersports_Rentals JOIN Beaches ON Watersports_Rentals.Beach_id = Beaches.id
WHERE Beaches.phonenumber = "555-555-5555"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?beach_clubs a :Beach_Clubs .
    ?beaches a :Beaches .
    ?beach_clubs p:hasBeaches ?beaches .
    ?beach_clubs p:name ?name .
    ?beaches p:PhoneNumber ?phonenumber_f .
    FILTER(STR(?phonenumber_f) = "555-555-5555")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?watersports_rentals a :Watersports_Rentals .
    ?beaches a :Beaches .
    ?watersports_rentals p:hasBeaches ?beaches .
    ?watersports_rentals p:name ?name .
    ?beaches p:PhoneNumber ?phonenumber_f .
    FILTER(STR(?phonenumber_f) = "555-555-5555")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}
